summary: WIN-068 detail_verdict_text P5 scope leak resolved via option (a) per curmudgeon c11: delete P5 (the 'Even granting that FSF = H(r)/r…' paragraph attacking FSF via Section 1.8 Coordinate Collapse) and replace with a one-sentence cross-reference to WIN-010's verdict, where FSF actually enters the predicted signal. Verified in-flight that WIN-010 detail_verdict_text already carries the Coordinate Collapse paragraph — no WIN-010 edit required, this is a clean scope fix. Ready for integration.
